name: get_symbols_overview
description:
Use this tool to get a high-level understanding of the code symbols in a file.
This should be the first tool to call when you want to understand a new file, unless you already know
what you are looking for. Returns a JSON object containing symbols grouped by kind in a compact format.

relative_path.title: Relative Path
relative_path.description: The relative path to the file to get the overview of.

depth.title: Depth
depth.description:
Depth up to which descendants of top-level symbols shall be retrieved
(e.g. 1 retrieves immediate children). Default 0.

max_answer_chars.title: Max Answer Chars
max_answer_chars.description:
If the overview is longer than this number of characters,
no content will be returned. -1 means the default value from the config will be used.
Don't adjust unless there is really no other way to get the content required for the task.
